title: Stinky Socks
description: A stinky mod for stinky people /j
body:
# What it is

A mod that I made because of some joke that a member of the hackclub slack made. I enjoyed making this mod so much and was (and is ig) one of the first large projects I have completed (getting minecraft was a pretty good motivator)

# Functionality

This mod adds a lot of fun fuctionality (not just socks) including...

- Wet, dry, stinky, and wet and stinky socks.
- A functional washing machine that makes socks wet, and removes thier stinkyness
- Furnace recipes that makes socks not wet

# The future
In the future I make and add...
- Custom Effects for corresponding socks
- Peaceful mobs run away from you, while passive and agressive attack you and have increased attack speed.
- Gain both the wet and the stinky effects when you walk in water, rain, or throw the item in water or rain.
- Make the item wearable.

That's it for now! Please comment and add your ideas!
